headlines.title: ABB Robotics launches PoWa cobot family targeting industrial tasks
headlines.summary: ABB Robotics said its new PoWa family of cobots addresses a long‑standing gap in the market between traditional cobots.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Accenture, Vodafone, and SAP to pilot humanoid robots in the warehouse
headlines.summary: The humanoids in the pilot are powered by Accenture’s Robot Brain solution, enabling them to interact naturally with human operators.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle humanoid, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Visa, Mastercard face new suit over card fees
headlines.summary: Three plaintiffs say a 2019 settlement in card fee litigation should not give the card networks years of legal immunity for antitrust claims.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, settlement ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Pudu Robotics raises nearly $150M as it targets industrial applications
headlines.summary: Pudu plans to use the funding to develop its embodied AI, grow its product portfolio, and expand in global markets beyond service robots.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
political_items.summary: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
political_items.summary: Local elections have been held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

political_items.title: Orbán steps down from Hungarian parliament after landslide defeat
political_items.summary: The outgoing prime minister will not take up his seat after leading his party back into opposition.

political_items.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
political_items.summary: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.
